name: PSU Power Adapter 48V1.46A
title: PSU Power Adapter 48V1.46A
description: The MikroTik 48V1.46A Power Adapter (48POW) is a reliable and compact power supply designed to provide stable and consistent energy to MikroTik devices and other compatible network equipment. It supports a wide input range of 110–240V AC at 50/60Hz, making it suitable for use in most regions worldwide. The adapter delivers a 48V DC output with a maximum current of 1,46A, providing up to 70W of power, which is ideal for smaller networking devices or setups with moderate power requirements. Its compact design makes it easy to install in both home and office environments, while ensuring safe and uninterrupted operation. Built with durability and efficiency in mind, the 48POW helps maintain stable performance of your network equipment and reduces the risk of downtime due to power fluctuations. This adapter is a practical and essential solution for keeping your devices powered and reliable.
